note: Project-level rollup. ORCH, M0 (8 repos), M0.5, M1, M2, M3, M4, M5, M6, M7 DONE and CI-green. M7: execution layer (graphed-core contract + graphed-exec-local with BOTH thread-pool and process-pool executors, deterministic straggler-tolerant tree reduction, open_once, adaptive reshaping, remote StageError via M6; AGC/MET bit-for-bit over partitions). Next: M8 (graphed-checkpoint — plan serialization + content-addressed checkpoint/resume).

ORCH.title: Deterministic orchestrator engine (Part B + B.8 faker suite)
ORCH.evidence: 41 frozen tests, 97% line+branch coverage, mypy --strict clean, CI green on A.5 matrix incl. 3.14/3.14t [2026-06-05] Hardened: added a CI-confirmation gate (GateReport.ci/done_ready) so a milestone can never be recorded DONE off an unfinished CI run (in_progress counts as not-green); review() holds in REVIEW with an 'awaiting_ci' signal until the EXACT pinned commit's CI is verified. New ci.py + scripts/confirm_ci.py (pure-Python, replaces shell gh-watch loops and the zsh word-split bug). 54 frozen tests; re-validated via the new confirm-on-pinned-commit flow.

M0.title: Repository spine (per repo)
M0.note: DONE for both existing repos; replicated per-repo as new package repos are created

M0.5.title: Reference corpus study & Required Operations Catalog
M0.5.evidence: ops_catalog + 23 runnable fixtures (ADL 1-8, AGC ttbar 2x5, TTGamma) reproducing stored references bit-for-bit on the full OS matrix; 60 frozen tests; graph-bloat note. Synthetic data + ONNX fixture flagged Phase-2.

M1.title: graphed-core thread-safe interned graph IR
M1.evidence: interning by structural hash; External PayloadDescriptor in hash; total-order float hashing (NaN self-interns, 0.0/-0.0 distinct); single-Mutex Send+Sync verified by loom + multi-thread stress; PyO3 gil_used=false. 21 frozen Python tests + 6 cargo tests + loom; CI green on A.5 matrix incl. free-threaded 3.14/3.14t. No unsafe.

M2.title: frontend + backend protocol + graphed-numpy
M2.evidence: deferred Array proxy records backend-agnostic IR into graphed-core; one node+form per op, repeated sub-exprs intern to zero nodes; backend-independence proven (two toy backends, identical to_dot, different results); map->External with preservation-risk descriptor; provenance stub raises ill-typed ops at the user's source line. graphed 12 tests/94%, graphed-numpy 14 tests/100%. CI green on A.5 matrix.

M3.title: graphed-awkward typetracer forms + provenance
M3.evidence: AwkwardBackend op_form via awkward typetracer (metadata-only, no data read) + real eval via one shared dispatch; gak namespace mirrors the awkward API. ADL queries 1-8 + AGC object-selection slice all record metadata-only with correct forms; materialize matches plain awkward; every node maps to a user line. Real provenance (graphed) with sub-expression text via executing, toggle, helper/comprehension survival. correctionlib + ONNX External nodes content-hash the file. graphed 24 tests/91%, graphed-awkward 32 tests/98%. CI green on A.5 matrix. ADL 1-8 run end-to-end as integration tests reproducing corpus histograms bit-for-bit (caught + fixed a q8 port bug). graphed-awkward 41 tests/97%.

M4.title: graphed-core optimizer: DCE/CSE + equality-saturation stage fusion
M4.evidence: RewriteEngine trait (egg-free boundary; no egg leak) + EggEngine genuine equality saturation with SOUND rules only (commutativity, +/* identities; mask-fusion/field-collapse excluded as unsound). DCE+CSE outside the engine; stage fusion never crosses a boundary. O(N) cost-quotient extraction (egg's Extractor is O(N^2) on deep chains — caught + guarded by the super-linear benchmark). 10k-node systematics graph reduces to O(stage) in <1s; reduction sub-linear across {1k,2k,4k,8k}; byte-stable. 13 Rust tests (toy-interpreter semantic equivalence) + 13 M4 Python tests; clippy/rustfmt/mypy/ruff/sphinx-W/loom clean. CI green on A.5 matrix.

M5.title: Necessary-buffer (column) projection
M5.evidence: Necessary-buffer (column) projection. graphed: Session.walk + Projection/OnFail/handle_opaque. graphed-awkward: reporting typetracer (metadata-only) -> touched form-keys -> columns; dimuon reads only the muon branches + MET.pt (5 of 20). graphed-numpy: NON-trivial projection via record sources + field-touch tracking (per user request). OVER-TOUCH PROTECTED in both (per user request): reading one column reads only that column; jets[jets.pt>30].eta reads exactly {Jet.pt,Jet.eta}, never siblings (the dask-awkward bug). Opaque map honors pass|warn|raise. Projection store-state independent (correct after M4 fusion). graphed 32, graphed-numpy 32, graphed-awkward 55 tests. CI green.

M6.title: graphed-debug: opt-level lowering, source-mapped tracebacks, viz
M6.evidence: graphed-debug (new repo). lower(session,array,opt_level): 0 = 1:1 op<->node + inter-op assertions; >=1 fuses op-runs between boundaries, each op keeping exact provenance (same error line at any opt level). StageError carries failing op + user source-frame chain + input forms + partition, all plain data; custom __reduce__/__setstate__ make it PICKLABLE -> round-trips intact across a process boundary (never an opaque string). run() executes op-by-op, localizing failures deep inside a fused stage. format_traceback collapses graphed* frames (user line last/marked), identical after pickle. visualize() = deterministic Mermaid/Graphviz + provenance + projected columns. 29 frozen tests incl. a REAL multiprocessing (spawn) process-boundary test re-raising at the user's analysis line (A.3 #8); 97% coverage; green on the full A.5 matrix incl. 3.14t. (graphed gained Session.source_value support.)

M7.title: Execution-layer contract + graphed-exec-local
M7.evidence: Execution layer. graphed-core owns the contract (Executor/Plan/Task/Partition/StopCondition, data-only). graphed-exec-local: BOTH a ThreadExecutor and a ProcessExecutor (spawn) running a Plan to one result via a deterministic, straggler-tolerant tree reduction (fixed combine-tree by leaf key -> bit-for-bit; a slow leaf blocks only its own path). open_once file-locality (per worker), stopping conditions, adaptive reshaping (next_tasks + running fold), remote StageError surfaced intact via M6 (process mode). 33 frozen tests: tree reduction, both executors thread==process, thousands of tiny tasks no deadlock/stall/race (incl 3.14t), straggler doesn't block others, open_once once-per-worker, adaptive + target-events stop, remote StageError, and a real MET analysis over partitions through BOTH executors reproducing the single-pass histogram BIT-FOR-BIT invariant to partition count. graphed-core M7 contract: 8 tests. CI green on A.5 matrix incl. 3.14t.

M8.title: graphed-checkpoint: plan serialization + checkpoint/resume
M8.note: next: graphed-checkpoint (+ graphed-core Plan serialization) — kill-and-resume bit-for-bit with less work; serialized plan runs with no source files; dead-letter/retry; byte-identical plan serialization
